title: 文件列表标签
completionRule: The legacy standalone Card is intentionally replaced by File Card > More > File information display. Complete only when the replacement preserves the legacy all/collect/none modes (default collect, with manual tags retained), plus bounded quantity and tooltip extensions through one persisted folder tag-display contract across every file view, with responsive interaction evidence.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: The wrapper prototype freezes delegation; the accepted host replacement places the controls beside the File Card views they affect instead of registering another properties Card.

sourceUiInventory.title: File Card 更多菜单替代入口
acceptanceItems: 在 File Card 更多菜单提供文件信息显示子菜单
设置作用于所有文件列表与网格视图

sourceUiInventory.title: 评分、收藏数、标签、数量和 tooltip
acceptanceItems: 独立显示或隐藏收藏标签数
显示或隐藏 EMM/manual/AI 标签
限制标签数量并选择是否显示完整值 tooltip

sourceUiInventory.title: 标签来源与命名空间
acceptanceItems: 缺失来源身份时不伪造分类

items.title: 以 File Card 更多菜单替代独立 Card
items.targetContract: Do not register another properties Card; place the display policy under File Card > More and consume it through the existing shared entry renderer.
items.notes: This replacement is explicitly requested and avoids a remote settings Card disconnected from the affected File Card.

items.title: 单一 folder.tag_display 持久化契约
items.targetContract: Persist tagMode (all/collect/none, default collect), showRating, showCollectTagCount, showTags, maxTags and showTooltips under [nodes.neoview.folder.tag_display] with bounded validation and no browser-local duplicate state.
items.notes: The same ReaderRuntimeConfig folderView mutation path used by the File Card owns persistence. The authenticated config route proves the complete policy is returned and serialized to [nodes.neoview.folder.tag_display].

items.title: 共享条目渲染限制数量和 tooltip
items.targetContract: Apply the policy in the shared FolderEntryMetadata renderer so compact, list, cover, mosaic and grid entries receive the same bounded tag count and tooltip behavior without new per-row subscriptions.
items.notes: The directory HTTP DTO carries the bounded tag arrays and count consumed by one shared React context value; no global listener or metadata refetch is introduced. Multi-view browser geometry remains planned.

items.title: EMM/manual/AI 来源与命名空间筛选
items.targetContract: Filter tags by explicit source and namespace identity only when the canonical directory DTO carries those identities; do not infer source from free-form text.
items.notes: The directory DTO and HTTP response preserve collected EMM tags and manual tags separately for the legacy collect mode. AI identity and arbitrary per-namespace filtering remain partial.
